package main

import (
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"time"
)

func PerCallClient() {
	client := &http.Client{Timeout: 2 * time.Second}
	_ = client
}

func Fetch(url string) error {
	resp, err := http.DefaultClient.Get(url)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	defer resp.Body.Close()
	return nil
}

func Serve() error {
	server := http.Server{Addr: ":8080"}
	return server.ListenAndServe()
}

func HandleImport(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) error {
	dec := json.NewDecoder(r.Body)
	var payload map[string]any
	return dec.Decode(&payload)
}

func LoadRows(db *sql.DB) error {
	rows, err := db.Query("SELECT 1")
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	defer rows.Close()
	for rows.Next() {
	}
	return nil
}

func Process(db *sql.DB, items []int) error {
	tx, err := db.Begin()
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	defer tx.Rollback()
	for _, item := range items {
		_ = item
		_, _ = tx.Exec("UPDATE widgets SET processed = true")
	}
	return tx.Commit()
}
